subject: english
title: Unit 8 Grammar 1 — Who · Leo's Test App
subtitle: 12 tabs, Leo tests what he learned: flashcards + quiz, fill-in, mini-MCQ, detective, sentence builder, drag-sort, join-the-pair, survey, editable word web, guess who (3 rounds), scored quiz, Dribble! soccer round.

content: Test what Leo learned about describing people with who.
Use who in sentence building, fixing mistakes, and sorting people vs things.
Score the formative quiz with at least 80%.
language: Recall vocabulary: clause, contraction, trilobite, creative.
Apply pattern: person + who + verb phrase.
Distinguish who (for people) from that/which (for things and animals).
